caption: The video shows a man playing basketball in an indoor gymnasium. He is wearing a sleeveless pink shirt and black shorts, and he is seen dribbling a basketball on the court. The gym has a polished wooden floor with blue markings, and there are two basketball hoops visible—one in the foreground and another in the background. The bleachers on the left side of the gym are empty, and the walls are painted white with a blue lower section. The man appears to be practicing his shots, as he is seen aiming towards the hoop in the background. The environment is well-lit, suggesting it is daytime or the gym is well-illuminated by artificial lighting.
